src: Classic work boots with tan leather, sturdy stitching, metallic eyelets for laces, thick rubber soles, and embossed logo on the tongue.
edit: Ultra-modern chunky boots with sleek design, metallic accents, futuristic transparent elements, thick platform soles, and luminous branding on the tongue.

per_image_non_shared_src.clem-onojeghuo-D8-7ra4Ocxw-unsplash: The object sits on a concrete pavement with a brick step in the background. The boot is slightly angled, showcasing the side, with the foot resting naturally on the ground.
per_image_non_shared_src.clem-onojeghuo-a7QYwkx_ZnM-unsplash: The object is positioned on a tiled sidewalk with a textured yellow wall behind. The boot faces forward slightly to the left, showing the front view and sole.
per_image_non_shared_src.clem-onojeghuo-a7QYwkx_ZnM-unsplash_copy: The object stands on a tiled path near a yellow wall, facing slightly left. The boot's side view is visible with subtle shadows on the ground.
per_image_non_shared_src.clem-onojeghuo-c317Wf_dydg-unsplash: Two objects are atop a smooth surface under a bright sky. Both boots stand with their sides visible, with a blurred cityscape in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.nathan-dumlao-Kuh5sIvT3as-unsplash: The object is set on stone steps, angled left with jeans rolled at the ankles. The focus is on the boot, with part of another blurred boot visible.
per_image_non_shared_src.nathan-dumlao-gUOoatBMCL4-unsplash: The object is placed on a gray, textured surface. The boot faces forward, showing the full front with the jeans covering the ankle.
per_image_non_shared_src.nathan-dumlao-vsTbiuRRKvA-unsplash: Two objects are on stone steps, front view centered. Both boots are slightly apart, creating a symmetrical view with jean cuffs visible.
